name: mise
description: Installs mise (https://mise.jdx.dev) system-wide as the toolchain version manager. Other features in this repo (node, go, rust, java) layer on top of this.

version.description: mise version to install. 'latest' or a specific tag like '2024.11.0'.

autoActivate.description: Add `mise activate` to the remote user's bash and zsh rc files.
